headline: Nvidia, Citigroup, Live Nation And A Real Estate Stock: CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: CBRE Group shares rose 0.8% to close at $141.06 on Thursday while Nvidia shares fell 0.7% to settle at $202.78 during the session.
